allow: Bash(echo "=== .gitignore ==="; cat .gitignore; echo ""; echo "=== git tracked env? ==="; git ls-files | grep -i env; echo "\(end\)"; echo ""; echo "=== .env.local \(keys only, redacted values\) ==="; sed -E 's/=.*/=<redacted>/' .env.local; echo ""; echo "=== next.config.ts ==="; cat next.config.ts)
